Class GameController.FloatingText

java.lang.Object
scenes.game.GameController.FloatingText
Enclosing class:
GameController
public static class GameController.FloatingText extends Object
A short piece of text that floats upward from a world position and fades out over time. Used for damage numbers, item pickups, and event notifications.

  • Constructor Details

    • FloatingText

      public FloatingText(double x, double y, String text, javafx.scene.paint.Color c, long lifeMs)
      Creates a new FloatingText at the given world position.
      Parameters:
      x - the initial x pixel position
      y - the initial y pixel position
      text - the string to display
      c - the text colour
      lifeMs - how long (in milliseconds) the text should remain visible

  • Method Details

    • isDead

      public boolean isDead()
      Returns whether this floating text has exceeded its lifetime.
      Returns:
      true if the text should be removed
